name: addEqualityTesters
signature: declare const addEqualityTesters: () => void

name: effect
signature: declare const effect: Vitest.Tester<Scope.Scope>

name: live
signature: declare const live: Vitest.Tester<Scope.Scope>

name: layer
description:
Share a `Layer` between multiple tests, optionally wrapping
the tests in a `describe` block if a name is provided.
signature: declare const layer: <R, E>(layer_: Layer.Layer<R, E>, options?: { readonly memoMap?: Layer.MemoMap; readonly timeout?: Duration.Input; readonly excludeTestServices?: boolean; }) => { (f: (it: Vitest.MethodsNonLive<R>) => void): void; (name: string, f: (it: Vitest.MethodsNonLive<R>) => void): void; }

name: flakyTest
signature: declare const flakyTest: <A, E, R>(self: Effect.Effect<A, E, R | Scope.Scope>, timeout?: Duration.Input) => Effect.Effect<A, never, R>

name: prop
signature: declare const prop: <const Arbs extends Vitest.Arbitraries>(name: string, arbitraries: Arbs, self: (properties: { [K in keyof Arbs]: Arbs[K] extends FC.Arbitrary<infer T> ? T : Arbs[K] extends Schema.Schema<infer T> ? T : never; }, ctx: V.TestContext) => void, timeout?: number | (V.TestOptions & { fastCheck?: FC.Parameters<{ [K in keyof Arbs]: Arbs[K] extends FC.Arbitrary<infer T> ? T : Arbs[K] extends Schema.Schema<infer T> ? T : never; }>; })) => void

name: it
signature: declare const it: Vitest.Methods<never>

name: makeMethods
signature: declare const makeMethods: (it: V.TestAPI) => Vitest.Methods

name: describeWrapped
signature: declare const describeWrapped: (name: string, f: (it: Vitest.Methods) => void) => V.SuiteCollector

name: API
signature: type API = V.TestAPI<{}>

name: "vitest"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "vitest" module.
signature: export * from "vitest"

name: Vitest.TestFunction
Vitest.Test
Vitest.Tester
Vitest.MethodsNonLive
Vitest.Methods
Vitest.Arbitraries
signature:
type Arbitraries = | Array<Schema.Schema<any> | FC.Arbitrary<any>>
    | { [K in string]: Schema.Schema<any> | FC.Arbitrary<any> }

name: fail
description: Throws an `AssertionError` with the provided error message.
signature: declare const fail: (message: string) => void

name: deepStrictEqual
description: Asserts that `actual` is equal to `expected` using the `Equal.equals` trait.
signature: declare const deepStrictEqual: <A>(actual: A, expected: A, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: notDeepStrictEqual
description: Asserts that `actual` is not equal to `expected` using the `Equal.equals` trait.
signature: declare const notDeepStrictEqual: <A>(actual: A, expected: A, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: strictEqual
description: Asserts that `actual` is equal to `expected` using the `Equal.equals` trait.
signature: declare const strictEqual: <A>(actual: A, expected: A, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: assertEquals
description: Asserts that `actual` is equal to `expected` using the `Equal.equals` trait.
signature: declare const assertEquals: <A>(actual: A, expected: A, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: doesNotThrow
description: Asserts that `thunk` does not throw an error.
signature: declare const doesNotThrow: (thunk: () => void, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: assertInstanceOf
description: Asserts that `value` is an instance of `constructor`.
signature: declare const assertInstanceOf: <C extends abstract new (...args: any) => any>(value: unknown, constructor: C, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts value is InstanceType<C>

name: assertTrue
signature: declare const assertTrue: (self: unknown, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts self

name: assertFalse
signature: declare const assertFalse: (self: boolean, message?: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: assertInclude
signature: declare const assertInclude: (actual: string | undefined, expected: string, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: assertMatch
signature: declare const assertMatch: (actual: string, regExp: RegExp, ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: throws
signature: declare const throws: (thunk: () => void, error?: Error | ((u: unknown) => undefined), ..._: Array<never>) => void

name: throwsAsync
signature: declare const throwsAsync: (thunk: () => Promise<void>, error?: Error | ((u: unknown) => undefined), ..._: Array<never>) => Promise<void>

name: assertNone
signature: declare const assertNone: <A>(option: Option.Option<A>, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts option is Option.None<never>

name: assertDefined
signature: declare const assertDefined: <A>(a: A | undefined, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts a is Exclude<A, undefined>

name: assertUndefined
signature: declare const assertUndefined: <A>(a: A | undefined, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts a is undefined

name: assertSome
signature: declare const assertSome: <A>(option: Option.Option<A>, expected: A, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts option is Option.Some<A>

name: assertSuccess
signature: declare const assertSuccess: <A, E>(result: Result.Result<A, E>, expected: A, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts result is Result.Success<A, never>

name: assertFailure
signature: declare const assertFailure: <A, E>(result: Result.Result<A, E>, expected: E, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts result is Result.Failure<never, E>

name: assertExitFailure
signature: declare const assertExitFailure: <A, E>(exit: Exit.Exit<A, E>, expected: Cause.Cause<E>, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts exit is Exit.Failure<never, E>

name: assertExitSuccess
signature: declare const assertExitSuccess: <A, E>(exit: Exit.Exit<A, E>, expected: A, ..._: Array<never>) => asserts exit is Exit.Success<A, never>
